name: zlib
build_commands:
python3 - << 'EOF'
import io
import os

path = 'zutil.h'
if os.path.exists(path):
    data = open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').read()
    before = data
    data = data.replace('#        define fdopen(fd,mode) NULL /* No fdopen() */', '/* fdopen is available on this platform; do not override */')
    if data != before:
        open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(data)
EOF
